scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,territory,vote,economy,profile,frontend "npm run dev -w services/auth-service" "npm run dev -w services/territory-service" "npm run dev -w services/vote-service" "npm run dev -w services/economy-service" "npm run dev -w services/profile-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:infra: docker-compose up postgres-auth postgres-territory postgres-vote postgres-economy postgres-profile redis rabbitmq minio -d
